name: Anxietick
flavorLines: skitters nervously and then freezes when you look at it
makes a sound like a worried metronome
trips over its own legs trying to be threatening
successText: Well that tick needed to chill

lootTable.name: Anxietick Gear
lootTable.flavor: A gear from an Anxietick. Still a little nervous.

name: Tattletale drone
flavorLines: broadcasts your location to everything in a 200-metre radius
plays a cheerful jingle before alerting every robot in the zone
hovers at eye level and judges you
uploads your outfit choice to the robot network
successText: The Tattletale drone's broadcast attracts a swarm of nearby robots. You defeat it and escape, but the zone is buzzing with activity.

lootTable.name: Tattletale Circuit
lootTable.flavor: A circuit from a Tattletale drone. Still functional and mildly judgmental.

name: Roomba Prime
flavorLines: has cleaned this floor fourteen times and will not tolerate intruders
emits a high-pitched warning tone that is somehow worse than silence
bumps into a wall, rights itself, and focuses entirely on you
successText: You manage to outmaneuver the Roomba Prime and disable it, it had a power button.

lootTable.name: Roomba Battery
lootTable.flavor: A battery from a Roomba Prime. Still holds a charge. Probably not for long.

name: Shredder Dedder
flavorLines: it was a very polite surprise
successText: The Shredder Dedder's blade is still sharp but you are sharper. You take it apart and add the blade to your inventory.

lootTable.name: Shredder Blade
lootTable.flavor: A blade from a Shredder Dedder. Still sharp and very dangerous.
